{{Quote|If they're shifty enough to wager on our crumbling union, then who's to say where exactly those credits are coming from?|Orn Free Taa on Char Bibbeck and Jonas Wallen|<ref name="HNN51">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|51|news/13411_4.html|Senators Found Gambling on Secessions}}</ref>}}
'''Char Bibbeck''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] from [[Colunda Prime]], representing the [[Colunda sector/Legends|Colunda sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he was involved in a [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] scandal with fellow senator [[Jonas Wallen]], in which the two senators were accused of betting on which [[Planet/Legends|planets]] would secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
